trigger.label: TWDatabase
trigger.style: position:fixed; left:5px; top:5px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; cursor:pointer; background:#212529 !important; padding:4px 8px; border-radius:3px; border:1px solid #343a40; z-index:1000001; text-decoration:none;

containerStyle: background-color: #212529 !important; border: 1px solid #343a40; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 0; box-shadow: 0 0.5rem 1rem rgba(0,0,0,0.5); width: 140px; font-family: sans-serif;
itemStyle: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; text-decoration: none !important; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid #343a40;
